title: launaea angolensis
intro: Launaea angolensis, also known as Angolan Launaea, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Launaea angolensis has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Launaea angolensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices for its medicinal applications.
